entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: Cicer arietinum L., an important grain-legume crop

entities.name: TERMINAL DROUGHT
entities.description: A major constraint to productivity in rainfed areas

entities.name: RAINFED AREAS
entities.description: Areas where rainfall is the primary source of water for crops

entities.name: EXPRESSED SEQUENCE TAGS
entities.description: Short sub-sequences of a cDNA sequence used for gene identification

entities.name: SUPPRESSION SUBTRACTION HYBRIDIZATION
entities.description: A technique used to identify differentially expressed genes

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to maintain growth and productivity during drought

entities.name: DROUGHT SUSCEPTIBILITY
entities.description: The lack of ability to maintain growth and productivity during drought

entities.name: IC4958
entities.description: A drought-tolerant genotype of chickpea

entities.name: ICC 1882
entities.description: A genotype of chickpea used for comparison, described as drought resistant/susceptible

entities.name: DRY DOWN METHOD
entities.description: A method used to expose plants to terminal drought conditions

entities.name: RECOMBINANT INBRED LINES
entities.description: Lines produced by crossing two different genotypes and selfing

entities.name: ROOT BIOMASS
entities.description: The total mass of the root system, used as a phenotype for selection

entities.name: UNIGENES
entities.description: Unique gene sequences derived from a set of ESTs

entities.name: CLUSTER ASSEMBLY
entities.description: A process of grouping similar sequences to form contigs

entities.name: SEQUENCE ALIGNMENT
entities.description: The process of arranging sequences to identify regions of similarity

entities.name: BLASTX
entities.description: A tool used to compare nucleotide query sequences against a protein database

entities.name: NCBI NON-REDUNDANT DATABASE
entities.description: A comprehensive protein sequence database

entities.name: GENE ONTOLOGY
entities.description: A system for functional classification of gene products

entities.name: ENZYME COMMISSION CODES
entities.description: A numerical classification scheme for enzymes

entities.name: KEGG PATHWAYS
entities.description: A database of biological pathways

entities.name: MACRO-ARRAY
entities.description: A high-throughput method for evaluating gene expression using dot blots

entities.name: NORTHERN BLOTTING
entities.description: A technique used to study gene expression by detecting RNA

entities.name: QUANTITATIVE REAL-TIME PCR
entities.description: A method for quantifying gene expression levels

entities.name: MARKER DISCOVERY
entities.description: The process of identifying genetic markers for trait selection
